blocks.text: Meeting Minutes: Operating Model Redesign Working Session
Prepared by John Johnson, Senior Analyst. These minutes record a working session held as part of the operating model redesign engagement for {{fact:f:E-2025-001.client}}.

items: John Johnson, Senior Analyst, Gladepoint Strategies
Amanda Compton, Director of Operations, Gutierrez-Murphy

blocks.text: Caroline Mayo opened with the current-state findings on structure and spans of control. The group agreed that the assessment reflects the organization as it operates today, subject to two corrections to reporting lines that Amanda Compton supplied during the session.

The balance of the session concerned decision rights. Amanda Compton described several recurring approvals inside Gutierrez-Murphy that route through her office without adding judgment, and Caroline Mayo proposed treating these as the first candidates for delegation in the future-state design. John Johnson noted that the spans-and-layers analysis does not yet cover the field organization, because the roster extract received to date is incomplete; conclusions for that group are deferred until the full extract arrives.

rows: Provide the complete field organization roster extract
Draft the decision-rights framework for the next working session

blocks.text: The next working session will be scheduled by email once the roster extract is in hand.
